solutions.solution: (c) 'Stump' and 'Point' are the terms used in 'Cricket' and similarly 'Dribble' and 'Corner' are the terms used in 'Hockey'. Hence, first and last are the terms used in the second.
(d) As 'Complexion' may be 'White' or 'Black', similarly, 'Officer' can be 'Honest' or 'Corrupt'.
(c) 'Talk', 'Whisper' and 'Shout' are different terms related with speech. Likewise, 'See', 'Look' and 'Watch' are the different terms related with glance.
(d) As 'Win' and 'Lose' are the two outcomes of 'Play', similarly, 'Death' and 'Survival' are the two outcomes of 'Accident'.
(b) As 'Potter' uses 'Clay' to make 'Pots', similarly, 'Tailor' uses 'Cloth' to make Clothes.
